task_desc: Fix D4.2 regression where accumGroom receives non-grooming locomotion signal via MN_HEAD, causing false groom state triggers during normal walking -- D4.2 changed the groom accumulator formula at connectome.js:469 from `abdomen + Math.min(legL1, legR1)` to `abdomen + head + Math.min(legL1, legR1)`, adding MN_HEAD signal to groom detection; the intent was to incorporate head-positioning signals from SEZ_GROOM (weight 4 in constants.js:308); however MN_HEAD also receives signal from DN_TURN (weight 4, constants.js:368) and SEZ_FEED (weight 4, constants.js:296); during active locomotion, the CX_FC->DN_TURN->MN_HEAD pathway delivers ~4 signal to accumHead every 2-3 ticks as DN_TURN fires from tonic central complex activity; simultaneously, min(legL1, legR1) carries 4-7 from DN_WALK and VNC_CPG walk signal; the combined accumGroom = 0 (abdomen, no groom stimulus) + 4 (head, from DN_TURN) + 4-7 (legs, from walk) = 8-11, which exceeds the BEHAVIOR_THRESHOLDS.groom of 8 (strict greater-than check at main.js:451) without any grooming stimulus active; since groom has higher priority than walk/explore in evaluateBehaviorEntry (main.js:451 vs 461-466), the fly enters groom state as soon as walk's minimum duration (500ms) expires and a tick coincides with DN_TURN firing; with BEHAVIOR_COOLDOWN.groom = 3000ms and BEHAVIOR_MIN_DURATION.groom = 2000ms, this creates a ~5.5s cycle of walk(500ms)->groom(2000ms)->cooldown(3000ms) where the fly spends only ~9% of its time walking; pre-D4.2, the formula capped at abdomen + min(legs) = 0 + 4-7 which stayed below 8 without active groom stimulus, allowing sustained walking until natural groom drive accumulated. Fix: either (a) raise BEHAVIOR_THRESHOLDS.groom from 8 to 12-15 to account for the higher tonic baseline from MN_HEAD + walk legs, or (b) only include head in accumGroom when abdomen also has signal (indicating actual groom command from SEZ_GROOM, not just locomotion noise), e.g. `accumGroom = abdomen + (abdomen > 0 ? head : 0) + Math.min(legL1, legR1)`, or (c) subtract a tonic baseline estimate from head before adding it, e.g. `accumGroom = abdomen + Math.max(0, head - 4) + Math.min(legL1, legR1)`. Files: js/connectome.js, js/main.js (threshold constant).
